apps.name: PiliPlus
apps.subtitle: 第三方 Bilibili 客戶端
apps.localizedDescription: 提供自動全螢幕、音量均衡、彈幕過濾等功能。

versions.localizedDescription:
直播支持切换线路
桌面端支持自定义最大音量 #2199
移动端支持设置播放器音量 #2358
优化视频字幕、截图 #2364 by @My-Responsitories
音乐页面显示全部标签 #2363 by @My-Responsitories
支持自定义播放缓存大小、缓存时长 #2370 by @My-Responsitories

修复 #2342 #2350 #2351 #2386
修复桌面端富文本输入 #2123 #2215 #2300
修复安卓端验证码窗口显示 #2341 by @My-Responsitories

apps.name: YTPlusM
apps.subtitle: YouTube 修改版
apps.localizedDescription: 提供去廣告、播放優化與額外功能。

versions.localizedDescription:
## YTPlusM release info
- **YT version:** `21.22.4`
- **YTLite:** `5.2.1` *(5.2.1 always the cracked version)*
- **iOS 16+**
## Must read:
- Releases named **YTPlus** are releases with only YouPiP, YTUHD, YouQuality, RYD, YTABConfig and DontEatMyContent.
- Releases named **YTPlusM** have got YouPiP, YTUHD, YouQuality, RYD, YTABConfig and DontEatMyContent **but also the extra YTPlusM tweaks** 
(YTweaks, Gonerino, YouSpeed, YTLowContrastMode, VolumeBoostYT, YouGetCaption).
